sections.paragraph:
(from the root אָמַן), f.-

(1) firmness. Exo 17:12, וַיְהִי יָדָיו אֱמוּנָה “and his (Moses’) hands were firm” (prop. firmness).

(2) security (Arab. أَمَنُ, أَمَانُ id.), Isa 33:6.

(3) faithfulness, in fulfilling promises. Applied to men, Psa 37:3 Hab 2:4 to God, Deu 32:4 Psa 36:6 40:11 . Pl. אֱמוּנֹות Pro 28:20.
